params.name: Human-readable name (e.g. "Eidolon Inference Node #1")
params.publicKeyHash: Hash of the TEE attestation signing key

params.hardwareId: TEE measurement (proves which hardware ran the inference)
params.modelHash: Fingerprint of the model that ran

returns.valid: True if attestation exists and is not revoked

verifyByComponents(address,bytes32,bytes.details: Useful when you have the raw inference data and want to check      if a valid attestation exists for it

isVerifiedProvider(address).notice: Check if a provider is registered and active

registerProvider(string,string,bytes32).notice: Register as a verified inference provider

verifyByComponents(address,bytes32,bytes.notice: Verify by recomputing the attestation ID from components
